versions.prompt_text:
Create a realistic studio product photograph of a single Desk Lamp with USB Ports (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Threshold™ in the Desk Lamps category.

Use this evidence-grounded visual description:
A stylish desk lamp featuring an oval glass shade and a wooden base, providing a warm glow with an integrated LED bulb. It's designed to enhance your space and includes two USB ports for convenient device charging.

Prioritize these supported details:
oval glass shade; wooden base; glass shade

Composition requirements:
- centered composition
- single isolated product
- neutral or studio background
- sharp, clean commercial product photography
- no extra accessories unless directly supported by the source evidence

Avoid these unsupported elements:
avoid suggesting plastic elements; centered composition; do not imply larger dimensions; neutral or studio background; no extra accessories unless explicitly supported; realistic product photography; single product only
versions.negative_prompt: avoid suggesting plastic elements; centered composition; do not imply larger dimensions; neutral or studio background; no extra accessories unless explicitly supported; realistic product photography; single product only
negative_constraints: no extra accessories unless explicitly supported

versions.prompt_text:
Create a realistic, presentation-quality product photograph of a single Desk Lamp with USB Ports (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Threshold™ in the Desk Lamps category.

Render the product as:
A compact desk lamp featuring an oval glass shade and a wooden base, equipped with two USB ports for device charging. This lightweight lamp emits a soft glow with a dimmable setting, perfect for creating ambiance in any cozy corner.

Strongly preserve these evidence-backed visual details:
oval shade; wooden base; glass shade; dimensional size; plastic cord covering

Scene requirements:
- centered composition
- neutral seamless studio background
- realistic product photography lighting
- single product only
- no lifestyle scene and no extra accessories unless directly supported by evidence

Explicitly avoid:
centered composition; neutral or studio background; no extra accessories unless explicitly supported; realistic product photography; single product only

Also avoid mismatches between listing expectation and review reality:
Do not add unsupported embellishments or misleading scale cues.
versions.negative_prompt: centered composition; neutral or studio background; no extra accessories unless explicitly supported; realistic product photography; single product only
negative_constraints: no extra accessories unless explicitly supported
